utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (with costs), additional_services (with costs), and total_budget. The final package includes all these items. Each is fully specified: 
1) destination – provided (Prague, Czech Republic), 
2) travel_dates – provided (July 1–5, 2024), 
3) transportation – fully detailed with airline, route, class, and total cost (€280), 
4) accommodation – fully detailed with hotel name, room type, amenities, and cost (€400), 
5) activities – several listed, each with name and cost, 
6) additional_services – provided with cost estimate (€470) and notes, 
7) total_budget – provided (€1,470). All seven required items are present and complete.
